summary: P1.8-10 B1.4/B1.5: Restores Recharts sparklines on Tăng trưởng revenue/profit tiles with deterministic 7-point series; adds separate Lợi nhuận / biên tile with RealEstimatedBar and product_scaling deep link.

interfaceChanges.description: Restored optional sparkline series on growth metrics; added Lợi nhuận / biên tile computed from product margin_pct.
Recharts LineChart wrapper for compact 7-point sparklines with reduced-motion animation control.

mappings.criterion: Tăng trưởng tab renders distinct Doanh thu 7 ngày and Profit/margin tiles
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue228_growth_sparklines.test.tsx::includes distinct Doanh thu and Lợi nhuận / biên tiles in growth summary

mappings.criterion: Sparkline SVG/Recharts wrapper present on revenue + profit tiles
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue228_growth_sparklines.test.tsx::integration: growth Tăng trưởng tab renders profit tile and Recharts sparklines
web/src/__tests__/test_issue228_growth_sparklines.test.tsx::builds deterministic 7-point sparkline series from model inputs
web/src/__tests__/test_issue228_growth_sparklines.test.tsx::disables sparkline entry animation when prefers-reduced-motion is reduce

mappings.criterion: Integration test: growth persona Tăng trưởng tab has profit tile + sparkline test IDs
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_issue228_growth_sparklines.test.tsx::integration: growth Tăng trưởng tab renders profit tile and Recharts sparklines
